summary: Bug fix verification for NIT field loading in InvoiceCreator.jsx - All tests PASSED. The loadInvoice() function correctly merges company NIT from profile when loading older invoices that don't have this field saved.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting: <tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody>. This hydration error exists from previous iteration but doesn't affect functionality.
Console warning: 'A component is changing a controlled input to be uncontrolled' - appears when loading invoices with undefined NIT values, but functionality works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: The loadInvoice() function at line 131 now correctly fetches company NIT from profileAPI.getCompany() and merges it with invoice data using: nit: fromData.nit || companyNit
Minor: Consider adding default values in invoice.from state initialization to avoid controlled/uncontrolled input warnings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for NIT field loading verified and working. Company NIT (901814242) is correctly loaded from profile and merged with invoice data for both new invoices and older invoices. All NIT-related functionality working as expected.

test_1_login.description: Login with chatbotsmarketing21@gmail.com / Test123! - redirected to dashboard successfully

test_2_edit_existing_invoice.description: Clicked on COT-703 from dashboard, loaded invoice editor with company NIT field showing '901814242'

test_3_company_nit_in_form.description: Company NIT field (#fromNit) in 'De (Tu Empresa)' section shows value '901814242', also visible in preview pane

test_4_new_invoice_nit_prefill.description: Created new invoice via 'Nueva Factura' button - NIT field automatically pre-filled with '901814242' from company profile

test_5_client_nit_field.description: Client NIT field (#toNit) is editable, accepts input, and updates invoice preview correctly

test_profile_nit.description: Profile page shows company NIT '901814242' in 'Información de la Empresa' section

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: When loading existing (old) invoices, the company NIT field was not appearing in the form even though it was saved in the profile
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Modified loadInvoice() function at line 131 in InvoiceCreator.jsx to fetch company NIT from profileAPI.getCompany() and merge it with invoice data: nit: fromData.nit || companyNit
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: VERIFIED - NIT now appears correctly for all invoice scenarios
